subcodes.first_line: We call to remembrance them that drink from the Salsabíl of love and traverse the wilderness of affection with words that pure hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شاربان سلسبیل محبت و سالکان بادیه مودت را متذکریم بکلماتیکه قلوب صافیه را
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God the only route to knowledge of God, @mystical themes, @unity; oneness of humanity, @knowledge; recognition of God
